description: Web track. Change web radar configuration storage from singleton semantics to explicit per-device rows keyed by device_type. Migrate the existing row to rd03d, seed defaults for rd03d and ld2451, add a unique constraint on device_type, and expose context APIs that always require a device_type for get/update/payload operations. Do not add fallback lookup or implicit rd03d behavior.
title: Persist radar config per device
